violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed open containers pasta, repackaged grill chicken patties not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed surfaces around clean in place equipment needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed floors and wall contained build up of debris that needed cleaning.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Beef thawing on table not approved matter.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. burritos, chicken stored in cooler without date marking.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Handwashing sink had a scraper with grease and grease in the sink in cooking area. Handwashing sink in backroom contained wiping towels on and around sink. Bucket of towels in front of sink.
General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment , was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Unapproved poison or toxic material was observed in food establishment. Raid, wasp spray, Hot shot located thru establishment.
